title: 3 Months Of Heartbreak, Documented
text: hey guys so you've read the title of this video this is definitely the most vulnerable i've ever been online the purpose of this video is for somebody going through this kind of breakup i want you to know that you are going to be okay and i want to offer you some reassurance and some advice but you don't have to be going through a breakup anything could be happening in your life really this video i just wanted it to be reassurance that whatever you're going through in your life you're going to be okay i want to give a little bit of context about the relationship but i am a very very private person when it comes to that stuff so um we were living together but i didn't really post about it too much but yeah he was my best friend he was my first love um we like i said literally lived together i would wake up next to this person every single day i saw my entire future with him and wow like i went through this during lockdown it was kind of like a movie it was very much like he just kind of packed his stuff and left i couldn't really like see any friends i was kind of stuck in this house that we used to live in together in this bedroom that he was in every day and it just it was a different kind of pain that i had never felt before in my life see i'm very obsessive and i love to research things and i read a lot of things that were like journal like do a lot of journaling so that you can look back and reflect on you know your progress and i just decided instead of journaling my version of that would be like picking up the camera and just recording a little bit every day and so i would pick up the camera and i would speak about what i was going through which is what you guys are going to see i've heard a lot of people before say like do not post your feelings online you know especially if you're an influencer don't talk about your feelings no one cares um and that probably is true but i'm so surprised because i felt really really alone i was so sad um so i just like kind of took to social media to like seek reassurance i think i posted a story just kind of being like i'm going through a breakup and i just like i feel like i'm not going to be okay like can you guys send me your stories if you've been through

title: 3 Months Of Heartbreak, Documented
text: of took to social media to like seek reassurance i think i posted a story just kind of being like i'm going through a breakup and i just like i feel like i'm not going to be okay like can you guys send me your stories if you've been through this kind of heartbreak like how am i going to get through it um because i had never been through this before it was my first boyfriend my first love my first everything so it was like really like [ __ ] it hit me hard and you guys just the amount of support like i feel so emotional thing about it the amount of support i got hundreds hundreds of dms paragraphs voice notes people sending me their numbers people saying like i will call you i'm gonna get you through this like you're gonna be okay and i just couldn't believe it and i actually ended up replying to um as many as i could and i made some good friends throughout the lockdown that would like you know some of you guys that were my followers that would call me and support me and i just don't understand what i did to deserve that but yeah words cannot describe how thankful i am all i can really do is give you this video and for the people out there that are heartbroken that are watching this i know how you feel i know how you feel i know it hurts but you are gonna be okay and breakups can be opportunities if you let them be and feelings demand to be felt there is no way to speed up the healing process but all i can offer you is reassurance that you will absolutely be okay and i hope that this video helps so yeah i guess we'll begin um with the first week of the breakup i literally recorded the very first day [Music] i keep wishing that he'll text me or call me and tell me that he misses me and that he wants to see me i'm just gonna take it day by day i don't know if anyone will ever love me i don't know if it's my fault i think i really like the comfort with him i like being

title: 3 Months Of Heartbreak, Documented
text: ll text me or call me and tell me that he misses me and that he wants to see me i'm just gonna take it day by day i don't know if anyone will ever love me i don't know if it's my fault i think i really like the comfort with him i like being comfortable haven't seen him in nine days every single part of me wants to call him right now and also i wish i could just drive to his house because it's five minutes away but i'm not gonna do that i want you to take a breath and i want you to take a breath and i want to put things in perspective [Music] it's been over two weeks now um last night was really difficult i sort of gave him the key to my happiness and i have decided as of today it's not going to be easy it's still very fresh i'm still going to miss him every day i'm going to post this video so people can um relate to it people can see it people can grow with me and i am giving myself three months of pain and healing and just struggling through this lockdown but i feel like once the three months has ended um hopefully i can be in a better much better place i'm going through my first session of therapy

title: 3 Months Of Heartbreak, Documented
text: i am giving myself three months of pain and healing and just struggling through this lockdown but i feel like once the three months has ended um hopefully i can be in a better much better place i'm going through my first session of therapy now as difficult as it is to do these video diaries and as disgusting as i look every day i realize that i probably have not worn makeup at all but that's okay because i'm a human being and i'm allowed to be ugly especially through a breakup in lockdown um two hours ago i cried my eyes out guys it's exhausting it's [ __ ] exhausting like i've noticed that at this point it's coming and going in waves as cliche and cringe as this sounds letting myself feel letting myself cry really does help like i haven't refrained from crying lately if i need to cry i'll cry i'll actually cry it out i'll tell someone how i feel and then somehow i always get out of it after i cry anybody watching this video is probably watching this in the very early stages maybe like the first day first few days and i just want to say that you can't let every other part of your body fail along with your heart so your heart is broken your heart's [ __ ] failing you can't break everything else in your body meaning what happens if six months down the line your heart heals and everything else has gone to [ __ ] because you haven't looked after your health your career you haven't seen your friends you haven't done things six months will come and it'll be such a waste of time so my thing is i want to at least get through and do things i don't want to lose myself too much but at the same time i'm allowing myself to be sad i'm crying i don't think there's a single day i haven't cried but i'm acknowledging that i'm going through a really hard time i don't know how to be alone and i'm scared and it's overwhelming but i'm gonna get through this and so are you one day everybody i know i know it doesn't feel like it right now but one day you'll be okay but [ __ ] [ __ ] it doesn't hurt right now the lockdown extend it i don't think he's gonna message you with what you wanna hear i don't think he's gonna come back buddy i'm sorry sorry buddy okay so i have makeup on um i have therapy tomorrow so i'm excited for that and i also acknowledge and accept that it's probably not going to be good like this every day like there's probably going to be moments where i feel really sad and i really miss him and i do like i'm thinking of a few memories right

title: 3 Months Of Heartbreak, Documented
text: or that and i also acknowledge and accept that it's probably not going to be good like this every day like there's probably going to be moments where i feel really sad and i really miss him and i do like i'm thinking of a few memories right now that are making me feel like sad but basically long story short like i don't want to talk too much about him just in case i ever post this video like this journey is my journey this is my video diary about how i'm getting over this heartbreak this is really for me it's nothing to do with him i'm not even mad at him like it just wasn't meant to be we have another 40 days of lockdown i'm probably going to cry again and yeah like i'm probably going to cry again and be sad and it's it's not just all up from here but the point is i wanted to check in and say that i'm in a much better place today this is a journey about how i got through this and like probably that one of the hardest things i've ever had to go through because i really did love him and we did live together and i i found that like heartbreak is honestly excruciating um i didn't realize it would be this bad [Music] [Music] [Applause] [Music] it definitely doesn't help that we're in lockdown it doesn't help that it's going to be raining the whole week i can't even go for walks i'm just going to be stuck inside a lot the thing is when i realized going through a breakup and you might be realizing this too is that you make so many excuses for them but he knows my number he's like he's just five minutes away down the road if he wanted to he would and it's just so pathetic that i'm sitting around here waiting and hoping that you know maybe we'll fix things i'm really [ __ ] sad today you don't do this to someone that you love he wouldn't have left and given me no closure and not said goodbye to my family and broken up with me over text i mean i just don't i can't imagine myself taking him back and trusting him again after what he's done [Music] so a few things i started to realize um in the second month because he wasn't there anymore i felt like my happiness would never come back i felt like my happiness was like tied to him some people never go through a really painful bad heartbreak and some people go through it really badly and i think i went through it really badly not only because i was it was very much a one-sided breakup and i didn't want it but also because of like childhood issues that i had like i am afraid of being alone and because

title: 3 Months Of Heartbreak, Documented
text: ugh it really badly and i think i went through it really badly not only because i was it was very much a one-sided breakup and i didn't want it but also because of like childhood issues that i had like i am afraid of being alone and because of lots of like family problems i've had i just don't have that really close good family bond and i don't have that perfect family relationship and he had that he had an amazing family and he was very comforting for me so i really trusted him i really saw us as family and i thought that he was going to be in my life forever like i really tied my happiness to him which is unhealthy because a relationship should be you should be like two cakes and you should be the icing for each other's cake you know what i mean like you can't you can't be meshed with that person like you have to be your own person okay with being on your own um with you know with your own ambitions your own dreams your own goals because realistically we come into this life by ourselves we're here alone you're not here with someone else you're not here to be with someone else forever you're here alone the only person you really have is yourself so i think it's really unhealthy to put your happiness in somebody else um and that's very much what i did and that's very much why the breakup was as intense and painful for me as it was you know being stuck here in lockdown having to face my feelings i couldn't even like escape my feelings you know how some people like get into a rebound relationship or they go clubbing or they just like get super drunk i couldn't do any of it i was stuck here in this house that we used to live in together we would stand next to each other and brush our teeth together we would sleep next to each other every night i was going through it you know what there is no way that you can skip the healing process i'm sorry and i know that hurts to hear but the sooner you go through it the sooner you will get out of it like just i understand that i need to let go i get it like i know i just i've been like suppressing my emotions and not dealing with the fact that it's probably really over like love is so crazy like i have this pain in my heart right now it feels really heavy so painful i just didn't think we would break up i messaged his mom and i told her that i don't want to see her in the nicest way possible just because this would definitely upset me i'm just i'm just gonna let myself cry [Music] i just want to talk

title: 3 Months Of Heartbreak, Documented
text: l i just didn't think we would break up i messaged his mom and i told her that i don't want to see her in the nicest way possible just because this would definitely upset me i'm just i'm just gonna let myself cry [Music] i just want to talk to him i just wish i could call him [Music] i'm doing these video diaries because it doesn't feel like i'm ever going to be okay so if there is a day where i watch this and i'm able to feel completely healed and full then you are a [ __ ] strong person you're strong and i can't wait to see who i become how strong i become this is for something this is bigger than me this is like it's it's genuinely exhausting i can't even believe i have the energy to pull out my camera and record this journey i mean you know i actually i actually feel bad for the people that are gonna watch this video that feel this way like i don't have any advice when i talk to the camera i don't there's nothing that can fix this pain that's like that's like somebody that's like trying to write a book on how to you know survive a sinking ship while the ship is sinking like you don't you gotta get through it first i can't do it yeah guess what guess what you're gonna do it because you don't have a choice like i lived with the guy i feel like i don't know myself like i don't know how to be alone i've never been alone and like i just don't know what the future holds i can't see it because every day is the same so i'm getting really depressed because i'm starting to realize that nothing can fix this pain even him coming back can't fix it it can temporarily but we're done because i could never trust him after leaving me like this so the only chance we have of getting back together is if i ever got to that place where i felt okay on my own i think that the um harshest reality for me and the hardest thing ended up being when i realized that nothing was going to fix the pain i was going through but time and just going through it because i realized that him coming back would not even fix the pain sometimes we really need to learn to be alone and independent and just to value ourselves deeply to be able to find that perfect relationship where like i said you are two different cakes but you're the icing for each other's cake and you're your own person and um you're independent you know and you're confident in yourself but you really make that other person's life better rather than relying on this other person to be your lifeline and to help you you know what i mean and to do everything for you like that's very it was very unhealthy because i just felt like i needed him and you should never feel like you need someone you should feel like you want someone but you don't need anyone you came into this life by yourself you don't need anyone to be alive and breathing and healthy okay and there are seven billion people out there in this world it takes one to love you the way that you need to be loved and the the chances of you finding that are so high and you are not going to be able to find that perfect soul mate of yours unless unfortunately i know it sucks but unless you go through a painful breakup unless you experience a relationship where you're able to determine um what you want and what you don't want in your next partner if you can love the wrong person for you so deeply then imagine how it would be to love the right person for you that is something i read that just like hit me like a brick it was such a roller coaster of emotions and i couldn't handle it and i just was i was in so much pain but i still had to work of course like i still had to you know shoot content and and um i had lost almost almost 10 kilos in the span of a month like really quickly i think it was like the first two weeks i will insert a photo i'm really sorry if this is triggering if it's triggering then like click off this video because i know some people get triggered by this stuff but there is this part in my instagram feed where i was completely depressed but you'd never be able to tell if you looked through my page you would never know so this photo that i took was for this sumo brand that i had to post um i feel like i feel like i made my body look healthy in it because i was like you know it was the lighting it was the sun i smoothed out my bones a little bit but really this is how i looked i was very very very depressed um you can see my bones sticking out like this is the skinniest i've ever been in my entire life and i also had to post a youtube video which i believe is still up and i can't even watch it because it makes me so upset and i lost so much weight and you can see my collarbone sticking out and i remember just finishing that video and sitting on the bathroom floor crying my eyes out i felt like i was not going to be okay um and i just wanted to emphasize like it's so important i know it hurts and you watching this video chances are you're in the first like month week day of going through a breakup it is so important to take care of yourself because i forgot to eat i was not eating anything i had no appetite which is understandable but i let it get to the point where i was unhealthy i was depressed like i couldn't even really stand up like if there's any advice i can give you it's that you really need to force yourself to eat you need to look after yourself i don't feel as much pain nearly as much pain as i felt like a month or two ago when i was like bowling my eyes out every day filming um and i've just taken two steps back today but it doesn't mean that i'm not gonna be like happy tomorrow like the point is like i've actually been feeling pretty good like every day when i wake up i feel happy so yeah okay this is a message to anyone out there that is really going through the bad parts of the heartbreak i kept like tossing on whether i should text him like that was something that i was battling with for weeks i think if someone can walk out on you and leave you then that is literally the greatest departure from your soul mate ever if somebody feels that they can live without you and be without you and not contact you it's i know it hurts but you cannot contact them because if they're meant for you they'll they will come back like if they are meant to be the person for you they will come back to you it's inevitable and if he moves on and never texts me again then that's it i'll continue no contact forever that is the closure that i need i have stopped telling myself that i need to speak to him one more time and have closure i don't need closure this is the closure if he can go on and not talk to me and move on then he's not the person for me and yeah i'm just getting to this place where i truly am okay with whatever outcome i don't really care i'm quite happy with the space and the silence he doesn't feel that urgency to talk to me so why should i talk to him you know i think there is something actually quite beautiful about being dumped about being broken up with i think sometimes people i don't know it doesn't mean they're a bad person but they don't really value you and they need to go see if the grass is greener on the other side or whatever and a lot of us that get dumped um we're completely heartbroken because we would have stayed probably until the end of time like honestly i would have gone married to this guy i don't i genuinely don't think i would have broken up with him so i'm actually so grateful for this epiphany this experience that i've had through being dumped it has been the most painful exhausting life-changing experience but it's beautiful and i wouldn't change anything about it because i'm learning so much about myself i am becoming the greatest version of myself and honestly i'm thankful for this because i can't imagine him going through the same journey because when you break up with someone i can only imagine that like i can see how they would start to regret it because they sabotage their relationship not you i gave him every opportunity to work on things i gave him every opportunity to come back and um yeah that's just it's out of my control and so i feel happy but i guess we'll see where everything takes us i'm gonna go hang out with my friend and i'll speak to you guys soon and here we are it's been a few months i feel so much better i'm very excited for my life i'm really excited to find myself to be like to become everything that i've always wanted to be i'm excited to travel i'm honestly excited to be single i'm excited to spend time with my friends and also um you know meet new people i'm just i'm so looking forward to the future and i'm so thankful to be alive and the worst parts of the breakup are over and i promise you listen to me listen to me and take this advice if you're going through a breakup do not contact them if somebody has broken up with you if somebody does not want to be with you if somebody is making it clear that they can go through the days without you then they are not the right person for you do not accept the breadcrumbs accept it for what it is for whatever reason you're not meant to be with that person right now and so you cannot give in to their breadcrumbs you cannot message them you can't prolong your pain that person that you're so heartbroken over that you want to see so bad that you want to talk to so bad that you want there with you it is an addiction and it is going to take time for you to be able to heal and be okay without that person because love is a drug and it gives you this dopamine rush and it is so painful at first but it will be okay and i honestly think if you stick to what i'm saying and you don't message your ex and you don't keep going back and forth and hurting yourself i think in three months you'll be where i'm at where you're just okay and you're excited for the future i really hope that this helps i really hope that you guys watching this are able to feel okay i hope that you don't text your ex because it's not worth it i'm definitely in a much better place with my health so i'm really happy about that um i love you guys and yeah i will see you guys in my next video i've been vlogging a lot and i have so many things planned for this channel if you guys like this kind of video and you want me to talk more about these kind of things then definitely let me know and i would be down to do that because i have a lot of things that i would you know be able to talk to you guys about but i didn't want to make this video super long but yeah i love you thank you so much for being here and i'll see you guys soon
